title: Aether 跨機部署（Redis auth+TLS / register / 遠端訂閱）
verification: python3 -c "import inspect,aether.core.aether_client as a; s=inspect.signature(a.make_redis); assert 'password' in s.parameters and 'ssl' in s.parameters"
test "$(grep -rn -E 'redis_lib\.Redis\(|redis\.Redis\(' --include='*.py' aether | grep -v __pycache__ | grep -vE 'aether/core/aether_client.py|tests/conftest.py' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" = 0

status_history.note: audit-spec: 內部 4b/5b PASS（修 Rule1 line-anchor）; 外部 Codex R1 = 5高+6中+2低 全修; Codex R2 = 全 RESOLVED + N1高/N2中/N3低 全修
兩輪外部審查所有 high 已關閉
